name: Intune Admin Center Tools
description: Comprehensive tool designed to streamline the management of Microsoft Intune devices. This extension allows administrators to efficiently check application and configuration assignments, manage device groups, download platform scripts, and perform various other administrative tasks.
author: Maciej Horbacz

securityCheck.aiSummary: High-severity credential harvesting via background.js token capture. Legitimate Graph usage is supported but token interception is not acceptable; remove this behavior. Replace hardcoded GA secrets with secure config. Overall tool appears legitimate with built-in analytics opt-in; ensure privacy and security controls.

noCredentialTheft.reason: Intercepts outgoing requests to graph.microsoft.com and captures the Authorization header (OAuth token) from Graph API requests. Stores token in chrome.storage.local for access by popup.js. This enables credential theft/possible misuse via other extension components. Lacks explicit user consent, token isolation, or secure handling; storage in chrome.storage.local may be accessible to other extension contexts. Risk: token leakage and potential abuse of Graph API.
